mapper.select: SELECT * FROM comic_chapter WHERE comic_id = #{comicId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY chapter_order ASC
SELECT * FROM comic_chapter WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comic_chapter (comic_id, chapter_name, chapter_order, content, html_content, image_count, status) VALUES (#{comicId}, #{chapterName}, #{chapterOrder}, #{content}, #{htmlContent}, #{imageCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE comic_chapter SET comic_id = #{comicId}, chapter_name = #{chapterName}, chapter_order = #{chapterOrder}, content = #{content}, html_content = #{htmlContent}, image_count = #{imageCount}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE comic_chapter SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
